name: mapbox-downloader
description: Cross-platform production tile downloader with row-level resume and provider configs.

scripts.upload: node scripts/install-storj-uplink.js --if-missing && node scripts/watchdog.js -- node storj-uploader.js
scripts.download:mapbox-pbf-splits: node scripts/watchdog.js -- node downloader.js configs/mapbox-pbf-cig.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-cmi.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-kuh.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-kyj.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-mcs.config.json configs/mapbox-pbf-rhc.config.json

author: XXX
